relevant_files.summary: Current single-path rules resolution pipeline with cached context but repeated node filtering and file reads.
Current multi-path wrapper over resolveRulesForPath; no shared union or cross-path file-content reuse.
Central registry for protected English tokens; currently includes .intent-ledger.jsonl.
Enforces English-only core sections and protected-token preservation in templates.
CLI path handling for human ledger append; duplicates ledger filename constant.
Shared server constants include LEDGER_FILE at repository root.
Fast path and staged file detection explicitly treat .intent-ledger.jsonl as root file.
Documents activation tiers and file:line evidence anchors.
User-facing onboarding still teaches root .intent-ledger.jsonl behavior.
Explains preserved English Reason line as stable token channel.

patterns.description: Meta/bootstrap/human-lock are cached once, but path-specific rule resolution is recomputed.

patterns.pattern: English protected token preservation with Chinese wrapper copy
patterns.description: Templates separate English hard-rule sections from Chinese explanation text.

patterns.pattern: Ledger path hardcoded at multiple layers
patterns.description: Repository-root .intent-ledger.jsonl is assumed across code, docs, and UI copy.

constraints: Fabric currently depends on .fabric/agents.meta.json to resolve rules; the file is missing in the current workspace, so MCP rule introspection fails locally.
The worktree already contains unrelated uncommitted changes in .fabric/audit.jsonl, .intent-ledger.jsonl, and packages/cli/src/scanner/tree-sitter-probe.ts; analysis must remain read-only.

integration_points.description: MCP single-path tool surface for rules resolution.
MCP batch-path tool surface for planning and architecture review.
HTTP API mirrors getRules payload for dashboard inspection.
Dashboard consumer of rules payload including description stubs.

key_findings: Batch rules querying exists but does not yet optimize shared rule resolution.
Bilingual stability is already enforced at template level through English-only core sections and protected tokens.
Script knowledge currently has no first-class home in Fabric's mirrored rule topology.
Ledger path behavior is spread across implementation, docs, and token registries.

_metadata.exploration_scope: rules loading, bilingual anchors, script documentation, ledger path
